## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change, and `python scripts/check.py` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if the change is user-facing (see "What belongs in the CHANGELOG" in `CLAUDE.md`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the public API changed
- [ ] For grammar / AST / compiler / binding changes, the cross-language contract stays in step (see `CLAUDE.md`)
